document.source_title: IPL 2026 Updated Points Table: RCB become first team to qualify for playoffs, DC stay in race

claims.claim_text: RCB became the first team to qualify for the 2026 playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: And with their win, RCB became the first team to qualify for the 2026 playoffs.

events.evidence_text: In the end, it was RCB who prevailed and inflicted a sixth straight loss on the Shreyas Iyer-led side.
A performance combining stability and execution finally arrived for the Delhi Capitals... culminating in a five-wicket win at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on Sunday.
